CustomField.description: Indicates whether this error is transient and may succeed on retry. Transient errors (for example timeouts or rate limits) can trigger automatic retry logic in eligible runtime flows.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check if this error type may resolve on retry (e.g., timeout, rate limiting). Unchecked errors are treated as permanent failures and will not be retried.
CustomField.label: Is Transient
